more.scanDesc: Diagnose a crop with the camera

plots.title: Plots
plots.deleteConfirm: This removes the plot and its mapping. Logs and journeys stay on the farm.
plots.empty: No plots yet. Add one to map and manage a field.
plots.name: Plot name
plots.noHealth: No health data yet for this plot.

resources.title: Inventory & resources
resources.noItems: No stock items yet. Add seed, fertilizer, fuel and more.
resources.deleteItemConfirm: Remove this item and its stock history?
resources.name: Name
resources.noEquipment: No equipment yet. Add tractors, pumps and tools.
resources.deleteEquipmentConfirm: Remove this equipment and its logs?

workers.title: Workers & team
workers.empty: No workers yet. Add the people who work this farm.
workers.name: Name
workers.deleteConfirm: Remove this worker? Their labor and payment history stays for records.

finance.noRecords: No records yet. Add income or an expense.
finance.addFarmFirst: Add a farm first to track finances.
finance.newBuyerPlaceholder: Or type a new buyer name
finance.deleteRecordConfirm: This will remove the record permanently.

today.addCoordsForecast: Add farm coordinates to receive the weekly forecast.
today.rainExpectedDays: {mm} mm rain expected over the next {days} days
today.setPlantingBody: {farm} has a journey, but planting date is not set yet. Add it so task timing and stage progress can start properly.
today.openJourneySetup: Open this journey and finish setup →
today.snoozeSkip: Can't do it today? Snooze or skip
today.allCaughtUp: 🌱 All caught up for now. Great work!
today.noJourneyBody: Select a crop and planting details for this farm so we can build the right tasks and monitoring timeline.
today.startFirstBody: Pick a crop and we'll guide you week by week from planting to harvest.

scan.title: Scan your crop
scan.subtitle: Take a clear photo of an affected leaf, stem, or pest. We'll identify the problem and what to do.
scan.healthyHint: Try a clearer, closer photo of the affected area in good light.
scan.errTimeout: The scan took too long. Try again on a stronger connection.
scan.errNoInternet: No internet connection. Connect and try the scan again.
scan.errBusy: The diagnosis service is busy right now. Please try again in a moment.
scan.errTooLarge: That photo was too large. Try taking a new, closer photo.
scan.errGeneric: Couldn't analyze the photo. Check your connection and try again.
scan.saveErrNoInternet: No internet connection. Connect and try saving again.
scan.saveErrBusy: Couldn't save right now — the service is busy. Try again in a moment.
scan.saveErrTooLarge: That photo was too large to upload. Try a smaller one.
scan.saveErrGeneric: Couldn't save to your logbook. Check your connection and try again.

logbook.attachUpTo3: Attach up to 3 photos to this note.
logbook.checkConnection: Check your connection and try again.
logbook.noNotesDesc: Tap + to add your first note — what you did, observed, or harvested.
logbook.noteNotFoundDesc: This note could not be opened.
logbook.errMaxPhotos: You can attach up to 3 photos.
logbook.errPhotoPerm: Photo library permission is required to add images.
logbook.errCameraPerm: Camera permission is required to take a photo.
logbook.errFarmNoJourney: Start a crop journey on this farm before adding notes.
logbook.startJourneyToLogHint: Farms without a crop journey can't take notes yet — start one from the farm dashboard.

farmCards.setPlanting: Set planting date to start the season
farmCards.monitoringStarts: Monitoring starts once this farm has a crop journey and location set.
farmCards.soilUnavailable: Soil data isn't available yet. Pull down to refresh — if it keeps failing, make sure the farm has a location set.

farmDetails.detailsToComplete: {count} farm detail still need to be completed.
farmDetails.detailsToCompletePlural: {count} farm details still need to be completed.

setup.tapMapToSet: Tap the map to set your farm location
setup.pickEasiest: Pick the easiest way for you.
setup.methodPointTitle: I am on my farm now
setup.methodPointDesc: Stand on your land and tap — we save your spot. No map needed.
setup.methodWalkDesc: Walk to each corner and tap. We measure the size for you.
setup.methodDrawDesc: Trace your farm on the satellite map with your finger.
setup.errEnterName: Enter a farm name before saving.

notifications.emptyBody: Rewards, badges, and farm alerts will show up here as you work through your season.
notifications.rewardUnlockedBody: You've earned enough XP to qualify for a partner input reward.
notifications.consistencyRewardBody: Your daily streak qualifies you for an extension program.
notifications.rewardAvailableBody: You have a new reward to claim.

taskSheet.confirmWhatDid: Confirm what you did before marking this done.
taskSheet.notDueUntil: This isn't due until {date}. You can still mark it done.
taskSheet.notePlaceholder: Add a note (e.g. what you observed, amount used)…
taskSheet.confirmHint: You can confirm without ticking every step.

syncBanner.offlineActive: Offline mode is active. New field work will be stored on this device.
syncBanner.allSynced: Everything is synced and ready for the field.

auth.signInSubtitle: Access your farms, offline logs, crop journeys, and field guidance.
auth.registerSubtitle: Start with a mobile workflow built for daily farming decisions and low-connectivity field work.
auth.farmerDescription: Manage my farm and crop journey
auth.agronomistVerification: Agronomist accounts open the expert workspace and require professional verification before receiving cases.
auth.consentPrefix: By continuing, you agree to our

dashboard.title: Farm Operations Dashboard
dashboard.ndviNoFieldBoundary: Map this farm's field boundary in Farms to unlock NDVI health, trend charts, and raster overlays.
dashboard.noNdviData: No NDVI trend data available yet for this field.
dashboard.weatherBad: Not ideal for field work today. Monitor conditions before going out.
dashboard.weatherOk: Field work possible but watch the weather. Be ready to pause if it changes.
dashboard.weatherGood: Good conditions for field work. Make the most of today!
dashboard.noSpray: Hold off on spraying — conditions aren't right for chemical application.
dashboard.needsWater: Your field could use water. Irrigate early morning or late evening for best results.
dashboard.rainExpected: Rain expected around {nextRainLabel}. Plan outdoor work before then.
dashboard.milestonesWillAppear: Milestones will appear as the season moves
dashboard.noActiveCrop: No active crop on this field yet.

farms.title: My Farms
farms.noFarmsDesc: Add your first farm to start tracking crops, field work, and local guidance.
farms.searchFarms: Search farms by name or location
farms.mapBoundaryForNdvi: Map this farm boundary to view NDVI overlays.
farms.noFarmsMatchDesc: Try a farm name, village, district, or another nearby location.
farms.mapError: We couldn't load the map right now.
farms.mapErrorDesc: Check the Mapbox request in the browser console if this keeps happening.
farms.mapboxNotConfiguredDesc: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_MAPBOX_ACCESS_TOKEN to see the live farm map.
farms.emptyMeta: Create your first farm to unlock offline mapping, weather, and crop journey tracking.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Your personal farming companion. Grow better crops with AI-powered guidance.
onboarding.mapFieldDesc: Map the field or drop a pin to set the farm location
onboarding.autoFilledSize: Auto-filled from the mapped field. You can still adjust it if needed.
onboarding.convertToHectares: We'll convert this to hectares in the background for analysis.
onboarding.pickCropNow: Pick the first crop now to skip the extra crop-selection step.

cropSelection.title: Choose a crop
cropSelection.subtitle: Select what you want to grow on {farm}.
cropSelection.savingFarmDesc: You can already choose the crop while Ecofy finishes saving the farm.
cropSelection.searchCrops: Search crops by name or scientific name
cropSelection.fetchingCrops: Fetching the latest crop list from the backend.

journey.title: Crop Journey
journey.milestonesSub: Important steps in this crop journey
journey.milestonesEmpty: Milestones will appear when the crop plan is ready.
journey.tasksSub: Work to do on the farm
journey.nothingToDo: Nothing to do right now — you're on track. 🌱
journey.noActiveJourneyDesc: Start a crop journey during onboarding to unlock stages, tasks, and milestone tracking.

market.title: Market Intelligence
market.premiumFeature: Premium feature — unlock advanced market analytics

aiChat.title: AI Farming Assistant
aiChat.weatherImpact: How will weather affect my crop?

activityComposer.crewHint: Select everyone who worked. The total cost is split across the crew.
activityComposer.noWorkers: No workers saved yet. Add them under More → Workers.
activityComposer.relevantFields: Only relevant fields will appear next.

logs.title: Logs
logs.notesPlaceholder: What did you do? Any observations…
logs.noLogs: No logs yet. Tap + to add your first.

settings.title: Settings
settings.syncMeta: Field logs, farm edits, and task completions can be captured offline and synced later.
settings.aiFieldDeskSub: Ask for crop advice, spray windows, and more
settings.farmMapSub: View and manage your mapped farms
settings.deleteAccountSub: Permanently remove your account and data
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBody: Your account will be locked now and permanently deleted after 30 days. Sign in again within 30 days to cancel. This removes your farms, logs and records.
settings.deleteAccountFailedBody: Something went wrong. Check your connection and try again.
settings.testNotifSent: Sent to {n} device(s). Check your notification tray.
settings.testNotifNoDevice: No registered device yet — make sure notifications are allowed, then try again.
settings.testNotifFailed: Couldn't send the test. Check your connection and try again.
settings.dailyRemindersDesc: Get reminded about your daily tasks
settings.addCropDesc: Add another crop to your farm
settings.manageCropsDesc: Manage your crop journeys. Add new crops or switch between active ones.
settings.faq1q: How do I track my crop progress?
settings.faq1a: Go to your Dashboard to see growth stages, tasks, and milestones for your active crop journey.
settings.faq2a: XP (Experience Points) are earned by completing tasks and milestones. They help you level up and track your farming progress.
settings.faq3a: Take a photo of your crop and our AI will analyze it for diseases, pests, and nutrient deficiencies.
settings.faq4a: Yes! You can manage multiple crop journeys across different farms and plots.

consent.title: Data & Privacy
consent.description: Control how your farm data is used to improve agricultural insights.
consent.shareLocationDesc: Help improve regional climate and soil recommendations
consent.shareCropDataDesc: Contribute to crop performance benchmarks for your region
consent.shareMarketDataDesc: Help build better price forecasts for all farmers
consent.partnerSharingDesc: Allow anonymized data to be shared with agricultural research partners
consent.dataPolicy: Your data is always anonymized and aggregated. Individual farm data is never shared.

monitor.lookingGoodDesc: Your field is in good shape. Keep up the regular care.
monitor.needsAttentionDesc: Some areas need your attention soon. Check the details below.
monitor.atRiskDesc: Your field has issues that need quick action. See what to do below.
monitor.urgentActionDesc: Your field is under serious stress. Act on the steps below today.
monitor.noSatelliteScan: No satellite scan yet — we'll check your field from space soon.
monitor.satGood: Satellite shows your crops are growing well. Vegetation looks healthy and green across your field.
monitor.satMedium: Satellite shows some areas with lighter vegetation. This might be normal, but it's worth checking if parts of your field need attention.
monitor.satBad: Satellite detects crop stress in your field. Some areas show reduced vegetation, which may indicate drought, pests, or nutrient problems.
monitor.weatherClear: Weather looks clear — good conditions for field work.
monitor.weatherWatch: Some weather to watch, but manageable for now.
monitor.overdueTasks: You have {count} overdue tasks. Catching up soon will keep your crop on track.
monitor.pendingTasks: {count} tasks waiting for you. Staying on schedule helps your crop thrive.
monitor.tasksUpToDate: All field work is up to date. Nice work!
monitor.noFieldVisits: No field visits recorded yet. A quick walk can catch issues early.
monitor.recentVisit: Field visited {days} days ago. Regular visits help you catch problems early.
monitor.visitSoon: Last visit was {days} days ago. Try to check your field this week.
monitor.visitOverdue: It's been {days} days since your last visit. Time for a field check.
monitor.aiRecsAppear: Personalised recommendations will appear in each risk card below
monitor.noRisksDesc: Your field looks great. Keep doing what you're doing!
monitor.scanningFieldDesc: Checking weather, satellite, and field data
monitor.couldntLoad: Couldn't load health data for this field.
monitor.noHealthData: No health data available. Add plots with active crops to start monitoring.
monitor.noFieldsYet: No fields yet. Add plots to your farm to start monitoring.
monitor.cropStressTitle: Satellite data suggests your crop canopy may be under stress.
monitor.noSatDataYet: No satellite data available yet. We'll start monitoring once data arrives.
monitor.ndviTrendDown: Vegetation health is trending downward over the past 30 days.
monitor.checkDrainage: Check that field drainage channels are clear
monitor.waterEarlyLate: Water early morning or late evening to reduce evaporation
monitor.considerMulch: Consider mulching to retain soil moisture
monitor.secureSeedlings: Secure any young seedlings or light structures
monitor.prioritizeIrrigation: Prioritize irrigation for the driest plots first
monitor.applyMulch: Apply organic mulch to preserve soil moisture
monitor.adjustPlans: Be ready to adjust field work plans
monitor.walkField: Walk your field and look for yellowing leaves, wilting, or bare patches
monitor.checkPests: Check for signs of pest damage or disease
monitor.compareAreas: Compare affected areas to healthy sections
monitor.takePhotos: Take photos to track changes over time
monitor.reviewTasks: Review your task list and start with the most time-sensitive one
monitor.markDoneOrSkip: If a task is no longer relevant, mark it done or skip it
monitor.setAsideTime: Set aside 1-2 hours this week to catch up
monitor.regularVisits: Regular field visits help you catch problems early.
monitor.noVisitsYet: You haven't visited your field yet. Early detection saves crops.
monitor.tooLongSinceVisit: It's been {days} days since your last field visit. Pests and diseases can spread fast.
monitor.walkFieldWeekly: Take 30 minutes to walk your entire field this week
monitor.checkLeafUndersides: Check leaf undersides for pests and disease symptoms
monitor.checkSoilMoisture: Look at soil moisture and weed pressure
monitor.logObservations: Log what you see so we can track changes

emptyState.emptyDesc: Ecofy unlocks personalized market intelligence, operations tracking, and AI crop support. Add your main plot on the map to begin.

weatherAdvice.toughFieldwork: Heavy rain or strong wind ({wind} km/h) — tough day for field work
weatherAdvice.veryHot: Very hot ({temp}°) — work in the cool morning or evening
weatherAdvice.rainLikely: Rain likely today ({rain}%) — good for the crop, plan dry jobs around it
weatherAdvice.rainLikelyPlain: Rain likely today — good for the crop, plan dry jobs around it
weatherAdvice.warmGood: Warm and dry ({temp}°) — a good day for field work
weatherAdvice.goodDay: Good conditions for field work today
weatherAdvice.sprayWind: Strong wind ({wind} km/h) — spray can drift. Wait for a calmer window.
weatherAdvice.sprayRain: Rain likely later ({rain}%) — spray can wash off. Wait for a dry window.
weatherAdvice.fertilizeHeavyRain: Heavy rain today can wash fertilizer away. Apply on a drier day.
weatherAdvice.fertilizeRain: Light rain expected — avoid applying right before a downpour.
weatherAdvice.fieldworkHard: Wet or windy today — field work is hard and can damage soil. Try once it dries.
weatherAdvice.irrigateRain: Rain expected today ({rain}%) — you may not need to irrigate. Check the soil first.
weatherAdvice.plantHeavyRain: Heavy rain today — seeds can wash out. A lighter day is safer.
weatherAdvice.veryHotGeneric: Very hot today ({temp}°) — work early or late and stay hydrated.

journeyStart.title: Start your crop journey
journeyStart.subtitle: Pick your crop and when you're planting — we'll build your day-by-day plan.
journeyStart.maizeOnlyHint: Maize is fully supported today — more crops are coming soon.
journeyStart.errFailed: Couldn't start the journey. Please try again.

mapHelp.title: Add your farm in 3 steps
mapHelp.step1: Go to your farm — or stand at one corner of it.
mapHelp.step2: Tap “My location” to drop a pin, or “Walk” to trace the edges as you walk around.
mapHelp.step3: Check the spot on the map, then enter your farm name below and save.

location.disclosureBody: Ecofy collects your device location to place and measure your farm on the map and to improve weather and agronomy guidance. Location is only used while you are using the app — never in the background.
location.permissionDenied: Location permission is needed to capture your farm position. You can enable it in Settings.
